layout.layout_rhythm: block-frame: high density, medium-low formality. Neobrutalist deck with pastel-neon color blocks and chunky black borders.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"slide_pad": "60px", "card_pad_lg": "60px", "card_pad_md": "36px", "card_pad_sm": "28px", "card_pad_xs": "22px", "gap_lg": "48px", "gap_md": "32px", "gap_sm": "24px", "gap_xs": "16px", "pad_bottom_clearance": "110px"}

template_json_typography.style: geometric sans display + neutral body, used in heavy weights for a poster-like feel

design_tokens_typography.style: geometric sans display + neutral body, used in heavy weights for a poster-like feel

typography.typography_role: geometric sans display + neutral body, used in heavy weights for a poster-like feel

cjk_policy.known_degradation: **No CDN Chinese monospace face for the "system readout" voice.** Space Grotesk's quasi-mono role (label-pills, counters, mono-tags, slide counter NN / NN) depends on its slightly geometric character plus the wide-tracked uppercase treatment. Neither survives the CJK translation. The slide counter and chart legend can keep Latin digits + Latin labels intact;

template_json_palette.description: off-white background with neon pastel blocks (hot pink, sky blue, lime green, golden yellow) framed in heavy black borders

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Space Grotesk 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Inter 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 Space Grotesk 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 Space Grotesk 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。
font_strategy.same_role_font_justification: 源模板本身以单一 sans/system family 承担多数字体角色；通过 weight/size/line-height/uppercase 区分 display/body/label/metric。

source_fonts.raw_value: 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif`. 思源黑体 ships Latin glyphs that pair cleanly with its Chinese characters, so mixed sentences render in one consistent face. The Inter / Space Grotesk distinction in the Latin original is preserved through weight contrast: weight 900 carries the brutalist display role, weight 600 carries the label role, weight 400–500 carries body. italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

italic.raw_value: ce contrast is **bold uppercase display ↔ sentence body ↔ wide-tracked label**. Italic is never used. Underline is never used. The only emphasis mechanism is weight contrast within the Inter ladder and the uppercase/sentence-case switch. Display elements should be allowed to **dominate the canvas**
